---
title: "Courses"
---

::: {.media-grid}

::: {.media-card}
![](content/courses/gds/featured.jpg){fig-alt="Geographic data science course image"}

### Geographic Data Science

<span class="meta">Policy-oriented introduction to geographic data science methods and workflows in R.</span>

[Course website](https://fcorowe.github.io/udd_gds_course/)
:::

::: {.media-card}
![](content/courses/intro-gds/featured.jpg){fig-alt="Map and code learning materials"}
